test_code:
from target import days_in_month

def test_days_in_month():
    # Months with 31 days
    assert days_in_month(2021, 1) == 31
    assert days_in_month(2021, 7) == 31
    # Months with 30 days
    assert days_in_month(2021, 4) == 30
    assert days_in_month(2021, 11) == 30
    # February in a leap year (should be 29, but function returns 29 for any month due to bug)
    assert days_in_month(2020, 2) == 29
    # February in a common year (should be 28, function returns 28 for any month)
    assert days_in_month(2019, 2) == 28
    # Edge case: February in a century non‑leap year
    assert days_in_month(1900, 2) == 28
    # Edge case: February in a century leap year
    assert days_in_month(2000, 2) == 29
